description_long: This is a large, lifelike African elephant with a robust, barrel-shaped body covered in textured gray skin. Its head is broad with large, fan-shaped ears that extend outward, and it has long, curved ivory tusks protruding from either side of its trunk. The trunk is thick and flexible, hanging down in front of the face, while the tail is long and thin, ending in a tuft of hair. The legs are sturdy and columnar, supporting the massive body, and the feet are wide and rounded. The overall appearance is realistic, with subtle shading and surface details that mimic the wrinkled, rough skin typical of an elephant.
description: A large, gray African elephant with prominent tusks, big ears, and a long trunk, featuring realistic wrinkled skin and a sturdy build.
description_view_0: Front view showing the broad head, large ears, and both tusks flanking the trunk.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the body, trunk, tusks, and tail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rounded back, tail, and the width of the hind legs.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the opposite profile with trunk, tusks, and tail visible.
